meta.name: template-f-fanout-compare
meta.description: TEMPLATE (F — fan-out comparative): N independent attempts at the same work, then a judge picks/synthesizes the winner. Rename meta.name, then replace every <placeholder>.
meta.whenToUse: Wide solution spaces where independent attempts beat one attempt iterated — designs, approaches, drafts

args.task: string (required) — <the work every attempt takes on>

steps.does: frame {task} into a precise brief: <constraints, success criteria, what a good answer looks like>

body.does: independently attempt {brief} from your own {angle} — <e.g. MVP-first / risk-first / user-first>

steps.does: judge {candidates} against the {brief}: score each, pick the winner, graft in the best ideas from the runners-up

end.review: <e.g. the winning candidate plus the judge's scoring rationale>
